prompt: Write blog post about JWT authentication from brief bullet points

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: concept_style_used
assertions.description: Uses concept explanation style given the educational nature

assertions.name: content_enhanced
assertions.description: Significantly expands the brief bullet points into comprehensive content

assertions.name: has_code_examples
assertions.description: Includes implementation code for JWT handling, token refresh, storage

assertions.name: has_security_warnings
assertions.description: Emphasizes security concerns with warnings and best practices

assertions.name: covers_all_topics
assertions.description: Covers: What is JWT, access vs refresh tokens, storage options, refresh flow, security

assertions.name: has_workflow_diagram
assertions.description: Includes visual representation of token refresh flow or authentication process
